task:
Thunderbird's Address Book already contains a contact `Emily Watson` with email `emily@oldstartup.com`.

1. Update that contact so primary email = `emily.watson@newventures.io` and company = `New Ventures Inc` (keep the contact name `Emily Watson`).
2. Create a draft (do NOT send) with:
   - To: emily.watson@newventures.io
   - Subject: Congratulations on the New Role
   - Body: I heard about your move to New Ventures. Congratulations! I would love to catch up over coffee sometime next week.

verification.command: check-contact-field Emily Watson company New Ventures Inc
check-draft-content Congratulations catch up over coffee
